---
title-block-banner: "#003262"
#title-block-banner-color: "#90A69E"
title: "Publish using Quarto"
subtitle: "2nd SARA Bootcamp March 2026"
format: html
toc: true
number-sections: true
---

![](banner.png){fig-align=center}

## Welcome 2nd SARA Bootcamp! {.unnumbered}

This website is your go-to resource for the bootcamp - it includes all slides and study materials in one place.

Each participant will:

1. Learn to use Quarto for writing a thesis, book, or research paper.     
2. Build a personal website using Quarto, GitHub, and Netlify.    
3. Create beautiful interactive slides using Reveal.js.   

If you find the materials helpful, we'd love a ⭐ on GitHub!

<span style="text-shadow: none;"><a class="github-button" href="https://github.com/sara-institute/course-publish-quarto" data-icon="octicon-star" data-size="large" data-show-count="true" aria-label="Star this on GitHub">Star</a><script async defer src="https://buttons.github.io/buttons.js"></script></span>

Thank you!

SARA website: <https://sara-edu.netlify.app/>

SARA Email: `sara.institute.info@gmail.com` $\cdot$ Call us at `925 315 2024`.


## [DAY 1]{style="color:#b01818"} {.unnumbered}

The slides title background image is from [Sora Sagano | unsplash](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593248196138-bad1a611a766?q=80&w=1932&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D)

{{< revealjs file="welcome.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

<br>

## Session

{{< revealjs file="r-intro.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

<br>

<br>

## Session

{{< revealjs file="quarto.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

<br>

<br>

## Session

{{< revealjs file="website.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

<br>

<br>

## [DAY 2]{style="color:#b01818"} {.unnumbered}

## Session

{{< revealjs file="reproducible-research.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

<br>

<br>

## Session

{{< revealjs file="thesis.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

<br>

<br>

<!-- ## Session -->

<!-- {{< revealjs file="thesis.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}} -->

<!-- <br> -->

<!-- <br> -->

<!-- ## Session -->

<!-- {{< revealjs file="slides.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}} -->

<br>

<br>

## Session

{{< revealjs file="thanks.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}
